title: Ore Veinminer Enchantment
description: adds a ore veinminer enchantment for pickaxes, allowing you to instantly mine entire ore veins with a single click
body:
# Ore Vein Miner

adds a **Ore Veinminer enchantment** for pickaxes, allowing you to instantly mine entire ore veins with a single click! ## Features - Custom enchantment that can be applied to pickaxes - Enchantment book can be crafted **Recipe** - Craft a **Ore Veinminer Enchanted Book** by combining: - Any enchanted book - 1 Diamond > ![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa2b6e97f81e5640dc50f1244d776161494c2d3.png) - Place both items in a crafting table (no specific pattern required) - Use an anvil to apply the book to a pickaxe ## How to Use 1. **Obtain an Enchanted Book:** - Craft: Enchanted book + Diamond - Result: Ore Veinminer enchanted book 2. **Enchant Your Pickaxe:** - Place your pickaxe and the Veinminer book in an anvil - The pickaxe is now enchanted with Veinminer 3. **Mine Ore Veins:** - Hold the enchanted pickaxe - Break any ore block in a vein - The entire ore vein will be instantly mined! ## Requirements - Minecraft 1.21 or higher ## Notes - The enchantment works with only pickaxes - Compatible with Silk Touch only - **Not works with Fortune**
